notes: Imports: gateway/async_client, pipeline stages (L1/L2/L3/red_team/resonance), shadows/shadow_agent for ShadowVote type. No back-import from app.py. generate_decision() backward compat: hypotheses=None handled at line 164 (hypothesis_summary = ... if hypotheses else ""). hypotheses=[] also handled — _build_hypothesis_summary returns "" for empty list (line 244-245). Prompt injection: HypothesisResult fields interpolated into user_prompt via _build_decision_prompt(), BUT chat_pro sanitizes both system and user prompts at gateway level (async_client lines 240-249) — risk is mitigated. shadow_votes=None is the live path (app.py:110 by design).
